command: molecule-ranker discover --disease "Synthetic V3 planning condition" --mode mocked --output-dir "$OUTPUT_DIR" --json
what_output_does_not_prove: No binding, activity, safety, efficacy, manufacturability, therapeutic value, or clinical validity is proven.
No assay result, protocol, synthesis instruction, or dosing guidance is provided.
what_output_means: The mocked V3 full discovery loop can produce a governed planning bundle.
The result bundle includes software/autonomy certification and human governance artifacts.
